channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐹 perplexityai/bumblebee (4189 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: perplexityai

📝 Repository: perplexityai/bumblebee

📄 Descrizione: Read-only developer endpoint scanner for on-disk package, extension, and developer-tool metadata, built to check exposure to known software supply-chain compromises.

⭐ Stelle: 4189

🍴 Forks: 372

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: golang package-inventory supply-chain-security

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-20T18:11:37Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-03T06:46:25Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 Kianmhz/GooseRelayVPN (1306 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Kianmhz

📝 Repository: Kianmhz/GooseRelayVPN

📄 Descrizione: Socks5 VPN that tunnels raw TCP through Google Apps Script to your VPS exit server (AES‑256‑GCM, domain‑fronted).

⭐ Stelle: 1306

🍴 Forks: 181

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: aes-gcm mitm proxy sni socks5 tunneling vpn

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-26T05:17:43Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-25T05:05:24Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 alibaba/open-code-review (1082 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: alibaba

📝 Repository: alibaba/open-code-review

📄 Descrizione: Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.

⭐ Stelle: 1082

🍴 Forks: 74

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: agent code-review code-review-assistant harness repository-level-context

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-18T02:16:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-03T06:36:57Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

👤 Owner: ajavadinezhad

📝 Repository: ajavadinezhad/zyrln

📄 Descrizione: Domain-fronting relay that routes traffic through Google infrastructure to bypass DPI-based censorship, Android VPN app + desktop proxy https://t.me/z_yrln | https://t.me/z_yrln_channel

🍴 Forks: 114

💻 Linguaggio: Go

item.title: 🐹 alash3al/stash (699 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: alash3al

📝 Repository: alash3al/stash

📄 Descrizione: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required.

⭐ Stelle: 699

🍴 Forks: 31

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: ai ai-agents ai-memory memory

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-24T22:05:12Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-22T06:12:03Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: NullLatency

📝 Repository: NullLatency/FlowDriver

item.title: 🐹 IRNova/Nova-Proxy-App (655 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: IRNova

📝 Repository: IRNova/Nova-Proxy-App

📄 Descrizione: نوا پروکسی - ابزار پروکسی محلی قدرتمند با قابلیت‌های GSA (Google Apps Script) با Domain Fronting، تکه‌تکه‌سازی TLS، تزریق ECH، بازپخش QUIC، MITM و مسیریابی هوشمند. طراحی شده برای عبور از فیلترینگ سنگین و DPI پیشرفته.

⭐ Stelle: 655

🍴 Forks: 98

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-25T17:57:46Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-23T23:53:00Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 ZhiYi-R/moon-bridge (305 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ZhiYi-R

📝 Repository: ZhiYi-R/moon-bridge

📄 Descrizione: Moon Bridge 是一个用 Go 编写的协议转换与模型路由代理。对外暴露 OpenAI Responses API（/v1/responses），对内支持 Anthropic Messages、Google Gemini（GenAI）、OpenAI Chat Completions 等多种上游协议。客户端指定不同模型别名时，自动将请求路由到对应上游 Provider 并在协议间自动转换。

⭐ Stelle: 305

🍴 Forks: 49

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-25T06:49:32Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-24T05:02:03Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 walkingddd/CPA-Helper (265 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: walkingddd

📝 Repository: walkingddd/CPA-Helper

📄 Descrizione: CPA-Helper is a local, self-hosted multi-user management panel designed for CLIProxyAPI users. It features independent API keys per user, isolated usage statistics, detailed request tracking, model pricing maintenance, available model querying, administrator account management, and Codex account inspection.

⭐ Stelle: 265

item.description:
👤 Owner: Hidden-Node

📝 Repository: Hidden-Node/GooseRelayVPN-AndroidClient

📄 Descrizione: GooseRelayVPN Android client: a SOCKS5 VPN with profile-based setup, live logs, and JSON import/export that tunnels raw TCP through Google Apps Script to your VPS exit server (AES-256-GCM, domain-fronted).

item.description:
👤 Owner: internetkafe

📝 Repository: internetkafe/deathcore

📄 Descrizione: High-performance load testing stress test (attack) tool that tears servers apart through VLESS tunnels. Supports XHTTP, gRPC, Reality, and post-quantum encryption. No mercy for your server.

🍴 Forks: 24

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: 3x-ui marzban remnawave vless

item.title: 🐹 mvanhorn/agentcookie (161 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: mvanhorn

📝 Repository: mvanhorn/agentcookie

📄 Descrizione: Your agent runs on a Mac that isn't your daily driver. agentcookie keeps its sessions in sync with the Mac you actually browse on, continuously, encrypted over Tailscale, so OpenClaw, Hermes, or any other agent runtime wakes up authenticated. macOS, peer-to-peer, no cloud middleman.

⭐ Stelle: 161

🍴 Forks: 7

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents automation chrome cli cookies golang macos tailscale

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-16T19:10:00Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-03T06:04:01Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
